100100000000110010101101111111 - ASI: 17

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 0 * 01
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 1 * 01
  111 = 1 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  01101 = 01 * 101
  001100 = 001 * 100
  100100 = 100 * 100
  111111 = 111 * 111
  10101101 = 101 * 01101
  0000001100 = 0000 * 001100
  10101101111111 = 10101101 * 111111
  1001000000001100 = 100100 * 0000001100
  100100000000110010101101111111 = 1001000000001100 * 10101101111111
